rationale: Round-1 approver re-verifying the round-2 delta (24af2fdb..34c787d3) introduces no regressions in the codebase-pin lens. `go test ./internal/setup/... ./internal/validate/... -count=1` passes both packages. The three NEW tests pass by name: TestInstallSkills_RefreshesPreClauseApproveSnapshot, TestGrillDisposition_TextConsistency (pins the three disposition fragments verbatim across ms-spec-create + ms-spec-grill and the approve resolution clause), and TestValidateSpec_GrillDeferredMarkerBlocks (backstop stays a SevError). Tree is clean, exactly TWO commits ahead of d1b4bebf. Mirror consistency confirmed by md5: ms-spec-grill byte-identical across all three surfaces (.claude/.agents/plugins); ms-spec-create and ms-spec-approve byte-identical across .claude and .agents (lifecycle skills correctly have no plugin mirror). build/vet/gofmt all clean. Bonus checks: pre0uur create/grill snapshots untouched in the delta, and the new ms-spec-approve.pre0uur.md is byte-exact vs the pre-change canonical (evaluated the Go string literal from 24af2fdb and diffed — identical). No new issues.

findings.detail: TestInstallSkills_RefreshesPreClauseApproveSnapshot PASS; TestGrillDisposition_TextConsistency PASS; TestValidateSpec_GrillDeferredMarkerBlocks PASS (asserts SevError on the unchecked deferral marker).
Exactly 2 commits ahead of d1b4bebf (34c787d3, 24af2fdb) on fix/0uur-headless-grill-guard; git status --porcelain empty.

ms-spec-grill identical across .claude/.agents/plugins (md5 47292dd5). ms-spec-create identical across .claude/.agents (b370e5de); ms-spec-approve identical across .claude/.agents (8ef125e0). Lifecycle skills have no plugin mirror by design; every mirror that exists matches.
go build ./... OK; go vet ./internal/setup/... ./internal/validate/... OK; gofmt -l reports no files.

pre0uur create/grill snapshots absent from the round-2 delta (untouched). New ms-spec-approve.pre0uur.md byte-exact vs the pre-change canonical: evaluated the ms-spec-approve raw+concat Go string literal from 24af2fdb:internal/setup/claude.go and diffed against the snapshot file => IDENTICAL.
